OPPORTUNITIES

Internships

Cinema and Media Studies offers students the opportunity to earn academic credit in connection with an internship, through CINE388 (Experiential Learning). Admission to CINE388 is by application only. See https://sllc.umd.edu/ﬁelds/cinema-media (https://sllc.umd.edu/ﬁelds/ cinema-media/) for more details.
